2.title: Foreground CPU

3.title: DB CPU
3.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries count = avg(`com.dynatrace.extension.sql-oracle.queries.cpuTime.count`), by: { `dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance` }
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

5.title: Allocated PGA

6.title: PGA memory used

7.title: PGA aggregate limit

8.title: PGA aggregate target

9.title: Library cache hit ratio

10.title: Sorts on disk
10.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries count = avg(`com.dynatrace.extension.sql-oracle.memory.diskSorts.count`), by: { `dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance` }
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

11.title: Sorts in memory
11.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries count = avg(`com.dynatrace.extension.sql-oracle.memory.memorySorts.count`), by: { `dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance` }
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20
